lineage: Public guide, public task, and public sources; overlap with intervention is intentional and declared.
aggregation: Thirteen one-point guide-step-aligned criteria; score/13. No threshold licenses capability or validity claims.

criteria.public_basis: public task line 10 and guide step 6 require analyst-chosen numeric thresholds to be distinguished from source-reported numbers

alternative_paths: Any allowed recommendation and any evidence organization pass when all public consequences are met.
claim_ceiling: Shared-lineage internal exact-version artifact discrimination only; evaluator-cue alignment is possible and no Skill effect, capability, expert/professional validity, safety, production fitness, cross-domain generality, or readiness is licensed.
